items.scenario: Physical assault on driver/operator
items.operatorResponse: Panic button; silent alarm; auto-share vehicle ID, route, location, and camera/audio snapshot.

items.scenario: Passenger seen with weapon or threat involving firearm/knife
items.operatorResponse: Silent alarm; request police/security; mark as high priority; preserve evidence.

items.scenario: App detects gunshot-like sound inside or near vehicle
items.operatorResponse: High-priority audio alert; share location; recommend stop/evacuation procedure based on policy.

items.scenario: Window, door, shelter, or vehicle glass breaking
items.operatorResponse: Audio alert; identify cabin zone; notify Transit Control; prompt damage/security report.

items.scenario: Passenger scream, panic call, or distress sound
items.operatorResponse: Alert driver; show nearest safe stop; suggest cabin camera check and control notification.

items.scenario: Physical fight or aggressive group inside vehicle
items.operatorResponse: Request security; onboard announcement; live location pin; incident timer.

items.scenario: Passenger forces doors, blocks closing, or attempts unsafe entry
items.operatorResponse: Door safety alert; hold vehicle safely; notify control; log incident.

items.scenario: Passenger collapse, injury, overdose, or severe distress
items.operatorResponse: Call emergency support; notify control; show nearest stop/intersection; prompt first-aid procedure.

items.scenario: Verbal abuse, hate speech, intimidation, threats
items.operatorResponse: Quick report; de-escalation prompt; request supervisor/security if escalating.

items.scenario: Conflict over fare, transfer, or payment rules
items.operatorResponse: Log incident; suggested de-escalation script; escalate if threats begin.

items.scenario: Unpredictable behaviour, substance use, person in crisis
items.operatorResponse: Monitor; notify control; request outreach/security depending on behaviour.

items.scenario: Raised voices or escalating argument detected
items.operatorResponse: Moderate alert; confidence score; ask driver to confirm if safe.

items.scenario: Suspicious package left onboard or near stop
items.operatorResponse: Report package; share location; follow TTC procedure; avoid handling package.

items.scenario: Graffiti, seat damage, broken equipment, tampering
items.operatorResponse: Capture report; attach photo/video; request security if active.

items.scenario: Passengers blocking driver area or interfering with operation
items.operatorResponse: Onboard announcement; notify control if persistent; log route/stop hotspot.

items.scenario: Road hazard, unsafe stop area, collision, blocked lane
items.operatorResponse: Route alert; request supervisor; share incident location; suggest safe stopping area.

items.scenario: Higher vulnerability at remote stop or low-passenger route segment
items.operatorResponse: Route risk indicator; optional check-in; nearby assistance info.

items.scenario: Passenger anger due to delays, detours, crowding
items.operatorResponse: Delay announcement script; alert control; monitor for escalation.

items.scenario: Cellular/data outage or failure to reach Transit Control
items.operatorResponse: Offline event logging; retry queue; fallback phone number; show connection status.

items.scenario: Too many alerts or complex interface while driving
items.operatorResponse: Hands-free voice alerts; large buttons; suppress low-confidence alerts; no typing while moving.

items.scenario: Glass break/gunshot/scream incorrectly classified
items.operatorResponse: Show confidence score; allow one-tap confirm/dismiss; retain event for model improvement.

items.scenario: Incident occurs outside monitored zone
items.operatorResponse: Show sensor coverage status; allow manual incident report.

items.scenario: Audio/video captures passengers or sensitive data
items.operatorResponse: Role-based access; retention limits; audit logs; clear privacy notice.

items.scenario: Location, audio, or incident data exposed
items.operatorResponse: Encryption, access control, monitoring, breach response plan.
